message:
fix(gitignore): anchor core dump patterns to repo root

Prefix core dump patterns with / so they only match at the repository
root, avoiding accidental exclusion of legitimate files in subdirectories
that contain "core" in their path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -131,8 +131,8 @@ path_test
 scan.txt
 
 # Core dumps and agent config backups
-core.*
-core
+/core.*
+/core
 *.mcp.json.*.bak
 cline.mcp.json
 opencode.json
